decisions_made.decision: Space Agent ecosystem config uses hardcoded Windows cwd path
decisions_made.rationale: pm2 resolves script paths relative to invocation dir, not ecosystem file; absolute path is the only reliable option on Windows.

decisions_made.decision: Trading dashboard switched to /api/poly/positions/live instead of /api/poly/trades
decisions_made.rationale: positions/live joins with poly_positions table to include current_price, unrealized_pnl, unrealized_pct — the missing live fields. Trades endpoint has kelly_fraction/strategy but no live pricing.
POLY_EXIT_ENABLED=false; showing disabled thresholds adds noise without actionable signal.

decisions_made.decision: Widget YAML edited directly on disk rather than via Space Agent chat
decisions_made.rationale: Faster and more precise than LLM-mediated generation for targeted code changes. Chat interface used for initial generation only.
